title: Laboon’s Pain
description: On pages 10–13, laboon’s pain as inside the whale, the crew meets Crocus and begins to understand Laboon’s pain and strange living arrangements.
scene: Laboon’s Pain. Inside the whale, the crew meets Crocus and begins to understand Laboon’s pain and strange living arrangements. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: That old man just jumped in!

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: We should hurry up and make our way to the exit before the whale gets anymore violent.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We've got no choice but to row!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: OK, Miss Wednesday. On the Count of 3-2-1 baby, I'm opening the door. So don't lose your focus!

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: Roger, Mr.9. Ready when you are.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I have no idea, Miss Wednesday!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Oh no, Miss Wednesday! Below us is a sea of stomach acid!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Well in any case, just help me out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There're two other weirdos aside from Luffy...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hey! That old man's running away!

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: Forget about him. Saving Luffy comes first.

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on laboon’s pain. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
